title: Sealed package
abstract: A shell for holding one or more products. The shell can comprise a base layer and a barrier layer extending along at least a portion of a face of the base layer, a central wall for receiving at least a portion of the one or more products on an upper side of the central wall, and a stiffening structure extending at least partially around the central wall. The stiffening structure can be configured for resisting bending of at least a portion of the shell toward the upper side of the central wall. The stiffening structure can comprise at least a recess extending along at least a portion of the central wall.
claims: 1. A shell for holding one or more products, the shell comprising: a base layer comprising cellulose fibers; a barrier layer extending along at least a portion of a face of the base layer; a central wall for receiving at least a portion of the one or more products on an upper side of the central wall; a stiffening structure extending at least partially around the central wall, the stiffening structure being configured for resisting bending of at least a portion of the shell toward the upper side of the central wall; the stiffening structure comprising at least a recess extending along at least a portion of the central wall; and wherein the barrier layer comprises a peelable barrier film selectively separable from the base layer.
